name: Austin Pinball Collective
description:
Public Hours:
Fridays: 2 PM-10 PM
Saturdays: 12 PM-4 PM
Sundays: 12 PM-4 PM
Mondays: 6 PM - 10 PM
Closed: 1st Monday of the month for maintenance.

See website at www.austinpinballcollective.org for events, tournaments, special events, etc. 

Day passes = $20. 
Everything is on Free Play. 
Members can get even more hours access, with $60/month rate, and $10 member guest passes. 

All machines are owned by members and loaned in to our community cared for collective! Machines are in great condition, or marked out of service until th

The ball spins towards the player on purpose, for a bonus extra fun challenge!!
Module is temporarily (2 weeks) replaced with Heist in the Multimorphic P3
Module temporarily replaced by Weird Al for two weeks!
Such a cool thing to see a P3 out on the floor. I like Princess Bride a lot. Fun game and plays great!

This is one of my all time favorite pinball machines. I play it every chance I get. This specific machine is special. It’s the single greatest Halloween I’ve ever played including private collections. Everything works perfectly, it is flawless in every way. I got to play it in a side room with the lights off for extra creepiness factor. Memorable pinball experience.
Really fun, plays great. Spinner heaven and when you roll it the buzz is so loud it could wake the dead. Awesome!
